headline: Child Abuse Reports Reach 7,200 With Only 380 Investigators Nationwide
context: JKM received 7,200 child abuse reports in 2025 but has far too few social workers to investigate and follow up.

cards.big: 7,200 child abuse cases reported in 2025 but only 380 child protection investigators employed
cards.sub: Each investigator handles average 19 active cases simultaneously exceeding safe limits

cards.big: Average investigation completion time is 8 months versus the 30-day statutory requirement
cards.sub: Children remain in potentially dangerous situations during prolonged investigations

cards.big: Child Act 2001 mandates investigation within 24 hours but JKM achieves this in only 45% of cases
cards.sub: Resource constraints make legal compliance impossible with current staffing levels

cards.big: UK employs 1 child protection worker per 15 cases with maximum 12 as recommended caseload
cards.sub: Adequate staffing enables thorough investigation and effective child safety planning

cards.big: An overloaded child protection system does not protect children—it documents their suffering
Should Malaysia triple the number of child protection investigators to meet statutory requirements
